name: Risotto with Toasted Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 300 Grams Risotto Rice, or quick-boiling rice
375 Grams Fresh Mushrooms, or mix of other types
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened.
2. Add rice to the skillet and stir until coated with butter.
3. Pour in the white wine and stir until absorbed.
4. Gradually add hot chicken bouillon, one ladleful at a time, stirring constantly until each portion is absorbed before adding more liquid.
5. Continue this process of adding liquid and stirring until the rice is tender and creamy, about 20-25 minutes.
6. Stir in grated Parmesan cheese and additional butter until well combined.
7. Finely chop or slice mushrooms and garlic. Heat olive oil in a separate skillet over medium heat. Add mushrooms and cook until golden brown, about 10-15 minutes.
8. Sprinkle chopped parsley on top of the risotto before serving.
This recipe serves 4 people.
